name: Independent consultant with explicit clients
description: Work-context-rich text describing engagements. Should produce identity with multiple clients as domain entities and recurring rhythms.

inputs.text: I'm an independent fractional CTO working with three early-stage startups: Bloom (HR tech, Series A), Voltage (climate hardware, seed), and Notebook (AI agent platform, pre-seed). I run weekly check-ins with each, monthly board prep for Bloom, and quarterly architecture reviews for all three. My background is 15 years in payments infrastructure (Stripe, Square, then engineering leadership at Affirm).
